heroSubtitle: Premium Fashion - From classic Old Money to modern Streetwear
aboutText1: Welcome to Joumonde - your destination for exclusive fashion. We combine the timeless elegance of Old Money style with the dynamic energy of modern streetwear.
aboutText2: Our mission is to offer high-quality fashion for every taste - from classic sophistication to urban coolness.
ourStoryText1: Joumonde was founded in 2025 with the vision of combining timeless elegance with modern streetwear. Our name unites the French "Jour" (day) with "Monde" (world) - reinterpreting the world of fashion every day.
ourStoryText2: We believe in quality, sustainability and timeless design. Each of our pieces is carefully selected and combines Old Money aesthetics with urban streetwear culture.
ourMissionText1: At Joumonde, it's not just about fashion - it's about a lifestyle. We want to help people find their individual style and feel confident, whether at a business meeting or at a street festival.
ourMissionText2: Our collections are produced by the best manufacturers, with a focus on fair working conditions and sustainable materials. Premium quality for us means not only first-class fabrics, but also responsibility towards people and the environment.
premiumQualityText: High-quality materials and first-class workmanship for durable fashion pieces
sustainabilityText: Responsible production, fair working conditions and environmentally conscious material selection
customerServiceText: Personal advice, fast shipping and first-class support for a perfect shopping experience
timelessDesignText: Classic elegance meets modern trends - fashion that doesn't disappear with the season
instagramSubtitle: Discover our latest styles and become part of the Joumonde community
newsletterText: Sign up and get exclusive updates
chatWelcome: Hello! How can I help you?
modalText: Do you really want to remove all items from the cart?

Klassischer Blazer.description: This classic blazer made of premium Italian wool is the perfect garment for the discerning gentleman. With its timeless silhouette and first-class workmanship, it adds an elegant note to any outfit. Ideal for business meetings, formal occasions and everyday elegance.

Polo Hemd.description: This classic polo shirt made of Egyptian cotton combines timeless elegance with supreme wearing comfort. The fine workmanship and premium material make it the perfect companion for leisure and business-casual. A classic that never goes out of style.
features: Contrast colored collar and sleeve binding

Knit Zip-Polo.description: The innovative Knit Zip-Polo combines the charm of a classic polo shirt with the practical functionality of a zipper. Made from the finest knitted material, it offers optimal freedom of movement and breathable comfort for active wearers.
features: Fine knit structure made of premium cotton blend

Chino Hose.description: The classic chino pants are a timeless staple for the modern gentleman. Made from premium cotton blend, they offer the perfect mix of comfort and elegance. Their versatility makes them the ideal companion for business-casual to leisure wear.
features: Adjustable inner waistband for perfect fit

Elegante Weste.description: This refined wool vest is the crowning piece for elaborately styled outfits. With its delicate structure and first-class workmanship, it imparts sovereignty and style to the wearer. Perfect as a layering piece for formal and dressy-casual occasions.
features: Elegant button placket with mother-of-pearl buttons

Quarter Zipper.description: The Quarter Zipper made of luxurious cashmere blend is the perfect bridge between elegance and comfort. The practical 1/4 zipper allows for flexible temperature adjustment, while the premium materials provide an incomparable feel. An investment piece for discerning wearers.
care: Hand wash or delicate cycle at 30°C

Strickpullover.description: This premium cashmere sweater embodies timeless luxury and incomparable comfort. The ultra-soft material gently hugs the body and offers an elegant silhouette that suits any occasion. A classic that lasts a lifetime.
features: Perfect balance of elegance and comfort
care: Lay flat to dry on even surface

Leinenhose.description: The lightweight linen pants are the perfect summer essential for the style-conscious man. Made from pure, premium linen, they offer breathtaking breathability and an elegant, relaxed look. Ideal for warm days and laid-back elegance.
care: Light steam or gently iron with damp cloth

Oversized Hoodie.description: The Oversized Hoodie is the urban cultural piece par excellence. With its relaxed cut and premium cotton, it offers maximum comfort without sacrificing style. Perfect for streetwear enthusiasts who like it casual and cool.
care: Tumble dry on low or hang dry
Iron on low temperature if needed

T-Shirt.description: This limited-edition graphic t-shirt is more than just a piece of clothing – it's a statement. With premium cotton and exclusive design prints, it becomes a favorite in any wardrobe. Limited quantities guarantee exclusivity.
features: Durable colors through special printing techniques
care: Tumble dry on very low temperature
Do not iron directly on graphic

Cargo Pants.description: The cargo pants combine functionality with modern streetwear style. With several well-thought-out pockets, they offer practical solutions for everyday life and adventure. High-quality workmanship and timeless colors – a statement for the practical fashionista.

Trainerhose.description: The track pants are the modern athleisure essential that perfectly combines comfort and style. With its tapered cut and premium materials, it's ideal for training, leisure and relaxed everyday elegance. Timeless, versatile and absolutely wearable.
